custom-routing.description: Indicates whether flow logs are enabled. Defaults to `false`
custom-routing.name: flow_logs_enabled

custom-routing.description: The prefix for the location in the Amazon S3 bucket for the flow logs. Required if `flow_logs_enabled` is `true`
custom-routing.name: flow_logs_s3_prefix

custom-routing.description: A map of listener defintions to create
custom-routing.name: listeners

custom-routing.description: Create, update, and delete timeout configurations for the listeners
custom-routing.name: listeners_timeouts

custom-routing.description: Create, update, and delete timeout configurations for the endpoint groups
custom-routing.name: endpoint_groups_timeouts

custom-routing.description: The value for the address type. Defaults to `IPV4`. Valid values: `IPV4`, `DUAL_STACK`
custom-routing.name: ip_address_type

custom-routing.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
custom-routing.name: tags

custom-routing.description: The name of the accelerator
custom-routing.name: name

custom-routing.description: The IP addresses to use for BYOIP accelerators. If not specified, the service assigns IP addresses. Valid values: 1 or 2 IPv4 addresses
custom-routing.name: ip_addresses

custom-routing.description: Indicates whether the accelerator is enabled. Defaults to `true`. Valid values: `true`, `false`
custom-routing.name: enabled

custom-routing.description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket for the flow logs. Required if `flow_logs_enabled` is `true`
custom-routing.name: flow_logs_s3_bucket

custom-routing.description: Controls if listeners should be created (affects only listeners)
custom-routing.name: create_listeners

custom-routing.description: Controls if resources should be created (affects nearly all resources)
custom-routing.name: create
